IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: TO SUPPORT THE UNIVERSITY OF NOTRE DAME, THE OHIO STATE UNIVERSITY, FL FLANAGANS BOYS HOMES, BOYS & GIRLS CLUB OF COLUMBUS, EASTER SEALS CENTRAL & SE OH, SALVATION ARMY OF COLUMBUS OH, AND ST VINCENT FAMILY CENTERS.
IRS990.MissionDesc: TO SUPPORT THE UNIVERSITY OF NOTRE DAME, THE OHIO STATE UNIVERSITY, FL FLANAGANS BOYS HOMES, BOYS & GIRLS CLUB OF COLUMBUS, EASTER SEALS CENTRAL & SE OH, SALVATION ARMY OF COLUMBUS OH, AND ST VINCENT FAMILY CENTERS.
IRS990.Desc: TO PROVIDE FOR 2020-2021 SCHOLARSHIPS AT OHIO STATE UNIVERSITY

ProgSrvcAccomActy2Grp.Desc: TO PROVIDE FOR 2020-2021 SCHOLARSHIPS AT UNIVERSITY OF NOTRE DAME

ProgSrvcAccomActy3Grp.Desc: TO PROVIDE SUPPORT AT FATHER FLANAGANS BOYS HOMES

SupportedOrganizationName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: Boys and Girls Club of Columbus

Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: PART V, SECTION D, LINES 2 AND 3
Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.ExplanationTxt: GLENNA R. JOYCE TRUST MAINTAINS A CLOSE AND CONTINUOUS WORKING RELATIONSHIP WITH THE SUPPORTED ORGANIZATIONS BY HOLDING MEETINGS TO DISCUSS INVESTMENTS AND THE GENERAL OPERATION OF THE TRUST, INCLUDING THE DISBURSEMENT OF FUNDS, TIMING OF GRANTS, AND NEEDS OF THE SUPPORTED ORGANIZATIONS WITHIN THE TERMS OF THE TRUST AGREEMENT.

Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: PART V, SECTION D, LINES 2 AND 3
Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.ExplanationTxt: IN ADDITION GLENNA R. JOYCE TRUST PROVIDES MONTHLY STATEMENTS THAT OUTLINE THE HOLDINGS AND ACTIVITIES OF THE TRUST AND THE INFORMATION REQUIRED AS PART OF THE ANNUAL NOTIFICATION REQUIREMENT.

Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: PART V, SECTION E, LINE LINE 2
Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.ExplanationTxt: DUE TO A CLERICAL ERROR AND NOT WANTON NEGLECT, THE ORGANIZATION WAS UNDER DISTRIBUTED IN 2019.
DUE TO THE COVID-19 PANDEMIC AND ISSUES WITH WORKFORCE, THE ORGANIZATION WAS UNDER DISTRIBUTED FOR A SECOND CONSECUTIVE YEAR, BUT THIS IS BEING CORRECTED IN 2021.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: EXPLANATION FOR FORM 990, SCHEDULE I, PART 1, LINE 2
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: GLENNA R. JOYCE TRUST IS A TRUST FUND THAT DISBURSES FUNDS ONLY TO QUALIFYING CHARITABLE ORGANIZATIONS AS DIRECTED BY THE TRUST'S GOVERNING INSTRUMENT TO BE USED ONLY IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE GOVERNING INSTRUMENT.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: EXPLANATION FOR FORM 990, PAGE 2, PART III, LINE 4d
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: BOYS & GIRLS CLUB OF COLUMBUS, EASTER SEALS CENTRAL & SE OH, SALVATION ARMY OF COLUMBUSOH AND ST. VINCENT FAMILY CENTERS

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: EXPLANATION FOR FORM 990, PAGE 6, PART VI, LINE 8a
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: GLENNA R. JOYCE TRUST IS A TRUST FUND AND HAS NO WRITTEN POLICY REGARDING DOCUMENTATION OF MEETINGS AND WRITTEN ACTIONS OF ITS GOVERNING BODY AND COMMITTEES WITH AUTHORITY TO ACT ON ITS BEHALF.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: EXPLANATION FOR FORM 990, PAGE 6, PART VI, LINE 8b
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: IS A TRUST FUND AND HAS NO WRITTEN POLICY REGARDING DOCUMENTATION OF MEETINGS AND WRITTEN ACTIONS OF ITS GOVERNING BODY AND COMMITTEES WITH AUTHORITY TO ACT ON ITS BEHALF.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PAGE 6, PART VI, LINE 11-DESCRIPTION OF PROCESS FOR REVIEW
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: PNC BANK, AS CO-TRUSTEE, ARRANGES FOR THE PREPARATION OF FORM 990. RETURNS ARE SUBMITTED TO PNC BANK FOR REVIEW PRIOR TO FILING.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: EXPLANATION FOR FORM 990, PAGE 6, PART VI, LINE 12c
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY OF PNC CHARITABLE TRUST REQUIRES AN ANNUAL AFFIRMATION THAT IT HAS BEEN RECEIVED, READ, UNDERSTOOD, AND AGREED TO BE COMPLIED WITH. IN ADDITION, THE POLICY REQUIRES AN ANNUAL DISCLOSURE OF THE EXISTENCE AND NATURE OF ANY AFFILIATION IN WHICH A PARTY WOULD BE CONSIDERED AN INTERESTED PERSON UNDER THE POLICY.
FORM 990 AND RELATED FINANCIAL STATEMENTS ARE MADE AVAILABLE THROUGH REQUESTS.
FORM 990 AND RELATED FINANCIAL STATEMENTS ARE MADE AVAILABLE THROUGH REQUESTS. THE GOVERNING DOCUMENTS AND CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY ARE MADE AVAILABLE TO THE PUBLIC UPON REQUEST.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: EXPLANATION FOR FORM 990, PART XI, LINE 9
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: 2019 SALES POSTED IN 2020 ($1,432); 2020 SALES POSTED IN 2021 $614; 2020 TRANSACTIONS POSTED IN 2021 ($9,983); TAX COST ADJ FOR WASH SALES ($63,353); ADJUSTMENT TO INCOME $1,854 RETURN OF CAPITAL ADJUSTMENT ($1,486); ACCRUED INTEREST POSTED IN 2020 EFFECTIVE IN 2021 ($4,583); ROUNDING ADJ FOR SALES AND TRANSACTIONS ($15)
